violations.text: The establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. ServSafe food safety certificate is current. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Various foods in the reach-in coolers were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Insectide and insectide tape were observed in the establishment. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The floors under the reach-in freezers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Food item was observed at 62 degrees F. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023

Cooked food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023
Observed establishment using fly tape in a food production area. Fly tape removed New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023

The floor in the back/storage/prep-area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023
